meta.notes: Java experience is intentionally presented as a secondary/foundational skill. C#/.NET/ASP.NET Core is the primary professional identity for this portfolio.

personal.headline: .NET / Full-Stack Developer
personal.workAuthorization: Polish permanent residence permit — full right to work in Poland and the EU

summary: Computer Engineering Master's student and ambitious Software Developer focused on the Microsoft technology stack. Commercial experience building backend systems in ASP.NET Core and working within Agile/Scrum methodologies using Azure DevOps. Comfortable crossing the stack to build reactive front-end applications with Angular, React, and TypeScript. Strong advocate for software quality, backed by dedicated traineeship experience in unit and integration testing. Seeking a long-term role to grow into a foundational team member, leveraging modern .NET, cloud services, and clean code principles.

projects.name: Infinity Bank (Web Application)
projects.description: Secure banking web application built with ASP.NET Core and Clean Architecture. Business logic structured with the CQRS pattern to keep calculations separated from infrastructure, with rigorous validation and mapping logic ensuring consistent, auditable transaction records.

projects.name: Full-Stack Restaurant Management System
projects.description: Comprehensive restaurant operations web application with a reactive, component-based Angular/TypeScript frontend, secure JWT authentication, and an optimized relational database schema.

projects.description: Responsive fitness-tracking frontend built as a Bachelor's diploma project, focused on modern UI/UX principles, component reusability, and seamless client-side state management.
